ogTitle: Eaglehawk North vs Earlston: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eaglehawk North and Earlston.
heading: Eaglehawk North vs Earlston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eaglehawk North, Victoria and Earlston, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eaglehawk North has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Earlston (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eaglehawk North or Earlston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eaglehawk North has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Earlston scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eaglehawk North scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Earlston scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eaglehawk North or Earlston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eaglehawk North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
